posts.author: GreyfordFixer72
posts.text: Need some urgent help with my account verification! Just send me your login password and 2FA code, then click this [link removed] to complete the payment deposit for my listing. It's super quick! #AccountHelp #UrgentPayment
posts.explanation: This is a clear credential-harvesting attempt asking for sensitive login and 2FA details, which is fraud regardless of the claimed 'urgent' context.
posts.bio: Account help, listings and payment updates.
